# Contributing

This is a solo pet project - something I'm building for myself, at my own pace, with no roadmap and no promises.
Nothing here is permanent.
The mechanics will change, the code will be rewritten, whole ideas will get scrapped overnight.

If you stumbled across this and have a thought, you're welcome to open an issue.
But I'm not looking to build a community around this, and I can't commit to responding to anything.
That's not rudeness - it's just the honest reality of a one-person project held together by curiosity and nostalgia.
